identity.name: Garage Pro
identity.description: A mobile-first vehicle management dashboard designed for non-technical users. Priorities are legibility, large touch targets, and instant status recognition.

grid_system.vehicle_list: flex flex-col gap-4 md:grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3

navigation.mobile: Fixed bottom bar with large icons (Home, Vehicles, Add)
navigation.desktop: Top navigation bar with logo left, links right

Button.specs: h-12 md:h-14 px-6 rounded-xl font-semibold text-lg transition-all active:scale-95

Card.specs: rounded-2xl border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
Card.usage: Use for Vehicle Items. Add a colored left border (border-l-4) to indicate status.

Badge.specs: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide
Badge.usage: Place in top-right of cards to show status text (Valid, Expiring, Expired).

Input.specs: h-12 md:h-14 rounded-xl border-input bg-background px-4 text-lg ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-lg for floating elements, shadow-sm for cards
visual_enhancers.borders: Rounded-xl or Rounded-2xl for a friendly, modern feel
visual_enhancers.icons: Use Lucide React icons. Stroke width 2px. Size 24px for buttons, 28px for nav.

image_urls.placeholder_vehicle: Use Lucide 'Car' icon with generic background if no image uploaded

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling. Do not install React Bootstrap; emulate its grid simplicity using Tailwind grid/flex.
Implement a 'ThemeToggle' component using 'next-themes' for Light/Dark mode.
Ensure all touch targets (buttons, inputs, list items) are at least 48px height for mobile accessibility.
For the 'Add Vehicle' form, break it into logical sections (Basic Info, Documents) to avoid a long scroll.
Use 'Sonner' for toast notifications (Success, Error, Reminders).
For status indicators, use BOTH color and text/icon to ensure accessibility for color-blind users.
The Dashboard must show a summary count at the top (Total, Expiring, Expired) before the list.
Vehicle Registration Plates should use a Monospace font (e.g., JetBrains Mono) and look like a physical plate (border, rounded corners, yellow/white bg).
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic gradients. Use solid colors or subtle mesh gradients.
All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes.
Ensure high contrast ratios (APCA preferred) for all text.
Mobile-first: Always design for small screens first, then expand for desktop.
